app.name: CodeCloud
app.tagline: Build, run, and deploy code from anywhere.
language.switcher.label: Language
footer.tagline: Build, run, and deploy code from anywhere. The cloud IDE for modern developers.
landing.hero.title: Code anywhere. Ship everywhere.
landing.hero.subtitle: A complete development environment in your browser. Powered by AI, available in {{count}}+ languages.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Unable to connect to the server.
errors.unauthorized: You must be signed in to perform this action.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
errors.validation: Please check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please slow down.
errors.server: Server error. Our team has been notified.
errors.payment: Your payment could not be processed.
errors.quota: You have reached your plan limits.
errors.auth.locked: Account locked. Try again in {{minutes}} minute(s).
errors.auth.lockedJustNow: Too many failed attempts. Account locked for 15 minutes.
errors.auth.oauthOnly: This account uses {{provider}} login. Please sign in with {{provider}}.
errors.auth.passwordOauth: Cannot change password for OAuth accounts.
errors.auth.resetTokenInvalid: Invalid or expired reset token. Please request a new password reset.
errors.auth.resetTokenExpired: Reset token has expired. Please request a new password reset.
email.welcome.subject: Welcome to CodeCloud!
email.welcome.body: Hi {{name}}, welcome to CodeCloud! Start coding today.
email.passwordReset.subject: Reset your password
email.passwordReset.body: Click the link to reset your password. This link expires in {{expiresIn}}.
email.deploy.subject: {{project}} deployed
email.deploy.body: Your project has been deployed to {{url}}.
email.lowCredits.subject: Low credits warning
admin.i18n.title: Translation coverage
admin.i18n.subtitle: Track translation completeness across all supported locales.
auth.login.title: Welcome back
auth.login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.register.title: Create your account
auth.forgot.title: Forgot your password?
auth.reset.title: Set new password
